description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named static-build-test-p4c that runs at midnight UTC and on push and pull request events to the main branch. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should define a matrix job build-linux that runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository with submodules, uses ccache, and executes a bash script to build and test p4c with different configurations.
